chapter_voice_summary: BG 2.70's voice is consistent with chapter 2's didactic-corrective register. The opening 'The metaphor is structural and exact' is the senior-engineer flat declaration that the verse has a precise structure to honor, mirroring 2.47, 2.48's pattern. The 'It is not impassivity / it is also not endurance-under-stress' two-step refusal of adjacent misreads is the chapter's standard corrective move. The 'puddle that overflows when it rains and dries when it does not' compression is the kind of compressed senior-engineer formulation the chapter rewards. The five-river morning is concrete-operational ('a Sentry alert for elevated 500s on checkout; a Slack message from the CEO...'), exactly the operational specificity the chapter rewards. The kāma-kāmī Sanskrit retention with reduplicative gloss is the chapter's preferred treatment of technical terms. No tonal break. Pass.
